title: hydrangea strigosa var. macrophylla
intro: Hydrangea strigosa var. macrophylla is a type of flowering plant, specifically a variety of the hydrangea species, known for its large and showy flowers. It is native to East Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving joint pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hydrangea strigosa var. macrophylla can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
